metadata.title: Air Monitor
metadata.description: Real-time air quality data worldwide. PM2.5, PM10, NO2, ozone and more – live from monitoring stations around the globe.

home.headline:
To breathe,
or not to breathe.
home.subheadline: PM2.5, PM10, NO₂ and more – live from monitoring stations around the world.
home.realtimeDesc: Measurements updated hourly, directly from official monitoring networks worldwide.
home.globalDesc: Thousands of stations on every continent, searchable by location or coordinates.
home.aqiDesc: PM2.5, PM10 and NO₂ combined into a single US EPA air quality score.
home.historyDesc: Hourly or daily historical charts for any monitoring station.

details.aqiFormula: AQI is the highest sub-index across all pollutants (US EPA formula).

chart.noData: No data available for selected range.

openaqErrors.forbidden: Access denied. Your account may be suspended.
openaqErrors.notFound: The requested resource could not be found.
openaqErrors.methodNotAllowed: This request method is not supported.
openaqErrors.timeout: The request timed out due to query complexity.
openaqErrors.gone: This resource is no longer available.
openaqErrors.rateLimited: Too many requests. Please wait a moment and try again.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.hostingText: This website is hosted by Vercel Inc., 340 Pine Street, Suite 801, San Francisco, CA 94104, USA. On every page request, Vercel processes technical access data (IP address, timestamp, requested URL, browser and device information) in the form of server logs. This data is technically necessary to provide and secure the operation of the site.
privacy.hostingLegalBasis: Legal basis: Art. 6(1)(f) GDPR (legitimate interest in secure and stable operation). Data is deleted after a maximum of 30 days.
privacy.analyticsText: This website uses Vercel Web Analytics to evaluate page views. No cookies are set and no personal data such as IP addresses are permanently stored. Vercel only collects aggregated, non-traceable usage statistics (pages visited, country of origin, browser type).
privacy.analyticsLegalBasis: Legal basis: Art. 6(1)(f) GDPR (legitimate interest in improving the service). As no personal data is processed, no consent is required. More information: vercel.com/docs/analytics/privacy-policy.
privacy.openaqText: The air quality data displayed comes from OpenAQ (openaq.org), a non-profit organisation based in the USA. Data requests are made exclusively server-side — your IP address is not transmitted to OpenAQ. OpenAQ provides publicly available measurement data; their terms of use can be found at openaq.org/developers.
privacy.thirdCountryText: Vercel Inc. is based in the USA. The transfer of personal data (server logs) to the USA is based on standard contractual clauses (Art. 46(2)(c) GDPR) and the EU–US Data Privacy Framework. Vercel is certified under the Data Privacy Framework.
privacy.retentionText: Server logs are automatically deleted by Vercel after a maximum of 30 days. Vercel Analytics stores only aggregated, non-personal statistics with no defined deletion period.
privacy.rightsIntro: You have the right at any time to:
rightsList: Erasure of your data, provided no retention obligation applies (Art. 17)
Object to processing based on legitimate interests (Art. 21)
privacy.rightsContact: To exercise your rights, please contact the controller listed above by email.
privacy.authorityText: You have the right to lodge a complaint with the Austrian Data Protection Authority (DSB) if you believe that the processing of your data violates the GDPR.
privacy.authorityContact: Austrian Data Protection Authority, Barichgasse 40-42, 1030 Vienna – dsb.gv.at

impressum.title: Imprint
impressum.name: Your Name
impressum.purpose: This website provides real-time air quality data for informational purposes only.
impressum.liability: Despite careful content control, we assume no liability for the content of external links. The operators of linked pages are solely responsible for their content. All data is sourced from OpenAQ and provided without warranty of accuracy or completeness.
